privileged_info_summary: The create_user_account task requires creating a user named Anita Sharma with username 'anita.sharma', female gender (code 'F'), and Provider role in a Bahmni/OpenMRS system. All metadata values are hardcoded consistently throughout the task scripts (setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, verifier.py) and align with standard OpenMRS conventions. The 'Provider' role is a predefined default role in OpenMRS. The task uses synthetic test data (fictional doctor account) not based on any real person or external data source. All values have been verified against the task scripts and OpenMRS documentation.
